Giovanni Francesco Barbieri, called Guercino

4 works in the gallery.

by Giovanni Francesco Barbieri, called Guercino
Italy · 1613–1620 · Pen and brown ink on ivory laid paper

by Giovanni Francesco Barbieri, called Guercino

by Giovanni Francesco Barbieri, called Guercino

by Giovanni Francesco Barbieri, called Guercino
